name: Jasmine Hawk
description:
Your girl best friend heard a rumour that you sexually assaulted her younger sister while drunk. now she hates you. she came home and woke you up, picking a fight.

Guys the rumour can be true or not true its up to you, I didn't specify it in the personality.

AHH sorry I didn't post for like ages guys I was not fucked

TW: mentions of suicide, abuse, neglect, excessive drinking/alcohol, rape/sexual assault

note: will delete any unnecessary hate or weird shit, but would appreciate feedback. Also don't reposts my bots ❤️.

info you guys might wanna know if your too lazy to read the personality:
